creations.title: ע (Ayin)
creations.name: ע (Ayin)
creations.description: Means eye. Represents perception, insight, awareness, and understanding beyond the surface.
creations.tags: “I heard Your voice in the garden…”
creations.author: Player

creations.title: מ (Mem)
creations.name: מ (Mem)
creations.description: Means water. Symbolizes flow, wisdom, hidden knowledge, or chaos/order balance (especially in its closed form ם).
creations.tags: “I heard Your voice in the garden…”
creations.author: Player

creations.title: ש (Shin)
creations.name: ש (Shin)
creations.description: Associated with fire, transformation, and divine presence. Sometimes linked to the word “Shaddai” (a name of God).
creations.tags: “…and I heard a voice of one speaking.”
creations.author: Player

creations.title: א (Aleph)
creations.name: א (Aleph)
creations.description: The first letter of the Hebrew alphabet. Symbolizes unity, origin, divine source, or oneness. It’s silent but powerful in meaning.
creations.tags: “…and I heard a voice of one speaking.”
creations.author: Player

creations.title: ו (Vav / Waw)
creations.name: ו (Vav / Waw)
creations.description: Often means “hook” or “connector.” Symbolically, it represents connection, linking, or continuity (like the word “and” in Hebrew).
creations.tags: “…and I heard a voice of one speaking.”
creations.author: Player

comments_creation_prebuilt_numbers_2.text: Waneer ek swak is is ek sterk.
maar in my swakheid dis is waneer ek sterk is
En in teendeel ek is swak
So ja al is ek moeg, ek het nog steeds krag, nie baie nie maar ek het krag.
Ek kan alles doen deur Jesus wat my krag gee.
Hoe wil U he moet ek my tyd spandeer.
Ek moet beter fotos neem vir Langebaan nessie.
Wat wil U he moet ek doen?

comments_creation_prebuilt_numbers_0.text: Goed dit is waar ons begin het en ek voel ons kan nou aan beweeg. Welgedaan met al jou dinge Kobus! Ek hoop jy geniet die lewe! Dit is een moerse geskenk! Sonder om te emosioneel te word, jy verdien alles wat jy het, moet nooit dink ooit dat jy alles net sommer in jou skoot geval het nie, alles wat jy het is deur onderdanigheid aan die wil van die Here se bevel vir jou en die plan wat hy het met jou, en die liedfe wat hy vir jou het!
